mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, TITLE AS title, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDate FROM BOARD WHERE (IS_HIDDEN IS NULL OR IS_HIDDEN = 'N') AND CREATE_DATE >= SYSDATE - 7 -- 최근 7일 이내 ORDER BY (VIEW_COUNT + LIKE_COUNT * 2) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, TITLE AS title, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDate FROM BOARD WHERE (IS_HIDDEN IS NULL OR IS_HIDDEN = 'N') AND CREATE_DATE >= SYSDATE - 7 ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC, VIEW_COUNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, B.LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, TO_CHAR(B.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDate, M.ROLE AS role FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE B.BOARD_ID = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, BOARD_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, VIEW_COUNT, LIKE_COUNT, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content} WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
UPDATE BOARD SET IS_HIDDEN = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_ID = #{value}
UPDATE BOARD SET LIKE_COUNT = LIKE_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{value}
UPDATE BOARD SET LIKE_COUNT = LIKE_COUNT - 1 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT C.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, C.BOARD_ID AS boardId, C.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, C.CONTENT AS content, TO_CHAR(C.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDate, C.PARENT_COMMENT_ID AS parentCommentId, M.ROLE AS role FROM BOARD_COMMENT C LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON C.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE C.BOARD_ID = #{value} ORDER BY NVL(C.PARENT_COMMENT_ID, C.COMMENT_ID) ASC, C.COMMENT_ID ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_COMMENT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENT ( COMMENT_ID, BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, PARENT_COMMENT_ID ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, SYSDATE, #{parentCommentId, jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID AS fileId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ORIGIN_FILE_NAME AS originFileName, SAVE_FILE_NAME AS saveFileName, FILE_PATH AS filePath FROM BOARD_FILE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{value}

SELECT FILE_ID AS fileId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ORIGIN_FILE_NAME AS originFileName, SAVE_FILE_NAME AS saveFileName, FILE_PATH AS filePath, FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, FILE_EXT AS fileExt, IS_IMAGE AS isImage FROM BOARD_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_REPORT ( REPORT_ID, BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, REASON, REPORT_DATE, STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_REPORT.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{reason}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
